messages.body: Hi Duy, I hope you are well. We noticed a 199$ was deducted will be refunded as well. Apologies for the inconvenience.
Please stop
Keep a good business by not doing things to peole that you wont to it to yourself.
Hi Duy, I hope you are well.   We will refund you the 249$ we have charged you today as we have cancelled your subscription starting today.

We just want to clarify that - on our end we can see - we have booked 37 clients entirely for the month of December until now and hence we will not be able to refund any charges from November or October.
Hello, could you please reach out to the client to assist her.  Baylee McAllister +1 3172942268  Thank you
Give me a minute, let me share the service agreement with you here
Post November 26th - we have only charged you today which we are refunding. Please let me know if there's anything else confusion, we will be happy to hop onto a call
Request Closed

If you kindly refer to this email, we need a 30 days notice for cancellation.   Even if we take November 17th as the first notice of cancellation - we ideally should be reversing any charge post December 17th
Please allow me 24 hours to share the credit screenshot with you. The 249$ charged today will be reversed to you. We really apologise for any inconvenience caused.
I still havr all your emails and not 1 word mention 30 days cancellation notices

This is the signed copy, you can refer it above. When a client makes a first payment with Zoca, they need to sign this agreement.   In your case, you signed this on 25th August and made the first payment.   Please let us…
We agree on this but we need to follow a protocol and hence it was Nov 26th that you conveyed to us you don't have the budget to continue and the request went to management.
Request Closed
Duy, could you kindly refer to the service agreement you signed on August 25th with Zoca?   The signee email on this document is : leann123450@yahoo.com

Hi Duy,   I am really sorry to hear that you would like to discontinue. We truly value you and your business, and we would appreciate it if you could help us understand the reason behind this decision. Your feedback help…
Booked a client.  Baylee McAllister +1 3172942268  Tonight at 5:45pm for 2 people, one person a gel builder mani and basic pedi, and the other person a basic manicure
I agreed to pay for October but i want my november charges back
When i signed up you told me that i can cancel anytime and then i requesed canceling on november 17th and still get charged again on november 25th.
We wish you a merry Christmas and a very happy new year!!
Hi Duy,   I am sorry about this. Your account manager will look into your November 17th request and be in touch shortly.
Request Closed
Look agian and tell me when did i request my cancelation
I want you guys to reverting the charges made from my October, November and now December.
Hi Duy,   I am really sorry this has happened. Your account manager will be in touch shortly to get this resolved for you.
And i have never singed anything like this
And if you have that email still please resend it now
This is not in my email
The same document can also be found on your email dated 25th August.

Wishing you a Merry Christmas and a lovely festive season! Thank you so much for your trust and support this year - it’s truly been a pleasure working with you and being part of your journey. If you’d like to catch up be…
Thank you so much Duy. Once the December charge is reverted - we will share a screenshot with you here. That should be completed shortly.

Hey Duy,  Apologies for the experience you are having with us, please be rest assured we will be reverting the charges made on your account post requesting for cancelation  Your account Manager will get in touch and help…
Thanks for your feedback!!
Hi Duy, please refer to this
We have only charged on December 24th post that and we apologise for that deduction and are immediately refunding it to you.
We will share a screenshot shortly post refunding 249$ that we have deducted this month. Please let us know if there's anything else we can help you with
Please stop this service immediately.
Hi Duy, we apologies for any inconvenience caused.  When we go through the communication here - it looks to us you mentioned about cancellation on November 26th
Absolutely Duy

Okay well done.  1. My acct is canceled  2. My december charge will be reverted. 3. You need to be honest with business 4. For your futur reference please let your client know the cancellation policy befor they sign up. …
This is crazy i have asked repeatedly to cancel my acct for the past 2 months due to over budgeting but you guys keep on charging my acct so i have to disput all the charges since November.
Here's an attached screenshot of our internal log confirming the agreement was signed by using the email address : leann123450@yahoo.com
I will make a disput for october and november because this is NOT an honest business.
What email? This is the only email i got for 8/25. No one ever mansion 30 days notices for cancellation.
Please do let us know if there's anything else we can help you with.
